pluses: Fighting-Uruk — great of frame and stout (12 hearts)
Eyes bred for the dark — Night Vision, always
A crushing, brutal blow — strongest of the Orc-kind (+30%)
Bloodlust — feeds on slaughter, mending swiftly with each kill (heal on kill)
Braced and unyielding against the shove of battle (knockback resistance)
Fire-toughened — burns briefer than most folk (base Uruk)
Sun-defiant — where lesser Orcs cower, the fighting-Uruk grows bold in the open day (+45% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
Tireless — barely spends food from toil or wounds, and marches far past other folk before weariness sets in
Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
